nasb.text: then you shall take an awl and pierce it through his ear into the door, and he shall be your servant forever. Also you shall do likewise to your maidservant.

esv.text: then you shall take an awl, and put it through his ear into the door, and he shall be your slave forever. And to your female slave you shall do the same.

cnv.text: 那麼，你就要拿錐子，把他的耳朵在門上刺透，他就永遠作你的奴僕；對待你的婢女，你也要這樣行。

ccb.text: 你们就要让他靠在门上，用锥子在他耳朵上扎个洞，他便终身成为你们的奴隶。对待婢女也要这样。
